goal: Add a wrist-mounted 84x84 RGB camera on the Allegro palm_link via TiledCameraCfg with RTX RealTime, feasible at 1024 envs without replicator overhead.
thoughts: TiledCameraCfg is the 5.x throughput path — one render product per tile, not per env. Plain CameraCfg at 1024 envs destroys throughput because each becomes a separate RenderProduct going through Replicator annotators. OffsetCfg convention defaults to ROS frame (X-forward, Z-up) in IsaacLab — must document which convention the authored offset uses. Unlit scenes yield all-black RGB obs and silent CNN NaN — add a dome light before training.
code:
# 1. Anchor in TiledCameraCfg patterns (not experimental in 5.x)
lookup_knowledge(query="IsaacLab TiledCameraCfg OffsetCfg RTX RealTime multi-env throughput")

# 2. Confirm palm_link prim path in the scene template
list_all_prims(root="/World/envs/env_0/Robot", name_contains="palm")

# 3. Ensure scene has at least one light — otherwise CNN gets black obs
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/DomeLight",
    prim_type="DomeLight",
    attributes={"inputs:intensity": <DOME_INTENSITY>, "inputs:texture:format": "latlong"}
)

# 4. Wire the TiledCamera (authored in scene cfg; shown here via tool wrapper)
configure_camera(
    prim_path="{ENV_REGEX_NS}/Robot/palm_link/WristCam",
    camera_type="tiled",
    width=84, height=84,
    data_types=["rgb"],
    offset_pos=("<OX>","<OY>","<OZ>"),
    offset_rot=("<QW>","<QX>","<QY>","<QZ>"),
    offset_convention="ros",
    render_mode="RaytracedLighting"
)

# 5. Obs term pseudocode:
# def wrist_rgb(env, sensor_cfg):
#     img = env.scene.sensors[sensor_cfg.name].data.output['rgb']  # uint8 (N,H,W,4)
#     img = img[..., :3].float() / 255.0                           # drop alpha, normalize
#     return img.permute(0, 3, 1, 2).contiguous()                  # BCHW for CNN

# 6. Post-wire perf check
check_physics_health()
failure_modes: Plain CameraCfg at 1024 envs — renderer stalls, <1 fps effective
Unnormalized uint8 or RGBA into CNN — NaN loss at step 1
BHWC left in place — Conv2d expects BCHW, shape error surfaces late
No dome light — all-black RGB obs, CNN learns nothing and throws no error
